explanation: This command replaces 'IWR' with an equivalent .NET WebClient method to bypass detection while maintaining the same behavior of downloading a file.
This command uses 'pwsh.exe' instead of 'powershell.exe' and maintains the same functionality, which may evade detection based on process name alone.
This command omits the explicit '-Uri' parameter, which is optional, and uses shorthand syntax to achieve the same result while potentially evading signature-based detection.
